title: Briefly structured meeting brief (Claude summarize intermediate)
description: The structured JSON Claude returns from the summarize stage. Claude owns the prose (summary/questions/headline text); the app owns all markdown structure (frontmatter, headings, ordering, the managed enrichment block). See docs/summarize-contract.md.

headline.description: One-line meeting summary; optional, used for frontmatter `summary` and the note title.

decisions.description: Optional cross-cutting decisions made during the meeting.

per_speaker.description: One entry per transcript speaker (the app reconciles: back-fills missing speakers, drops unknown ones).

speaker.description: Must match a display name/label from transcript.speakers[].speaker (e.g. "Paul Nathan", "Jane Doe", "Speaker_2").

summary.description: Bullet points: what this person said/contributed (empty array if nothing notable).

questions.description: Questions THIS person raised (empty array if none).

open_questions.description: Aggregated open questions across the meeting that still need answering.

owner.description: Who owns the answer, e.g. "us", "client", or a name. Optional.
